title: Lucid Group Tumbles After Missing on Q3 Earnings and Revenue
text: Lucid Group Tumbles After Missing on Q3 Earnings and Revenue. Q3 2023 Results. Lucid Group announced third quarter 2023 financial results that fell short of analyst expectations on both revenue and earnings per share metrics. The miss triggered a significant stock price decline as investors reassessed the company's operational and financial trajectory. Revenue Miss. Q3 2023 revenue fell short of analyst consensus estimates, reflecting production challenges and slower-than-expected demand for the Lucid Air sedan. The revenue shortfall indicated the company was not executing on its ramp plan as initially projected. Earnings Miss. Earnings per share results also missed analyst estimates, with losses widening compared to the prior year period. The deteriorating earnings reflected fixed cost absorption challenges as production volumes remained below guidance. Production Challenges. Management cited supply chain constraints and manufacturing complexity as factors affecting production volumes and delivery rates during the quarter. These operational challenges delayed the company's path to profitability. Market Reaction. Investors reacted negatively to the earnings miss, selling off shares and raising questions about management's ability to execute and achieve stated financial targets.
